name: Mystate Limited
analysis: MYS has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 5% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$4.6000, stop A$4.2372, target A$5.6884 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
